response.step_by_step_log:
1. Observed the video structure: The first part is a humorous, dialogue-heavy 3D skit involving Hoshimachi Suisei. The second part is a musical performance of 'Chiisana Koi no Uta' by Hoshimachi Suisei and Ouro Kronii.
2. Identified the song: The performance is a well-known cover, confirmed by audio recognition to be 'Chiisana Koi no Uta'.
3. Searched for song metadata: Searched for '"Chiisana Koi no Uta" MONGOL800 Japanese and English lyrics'.
4. Verified song details: Confirmed MONGOL800 as the original artist.
5. Compiled lyrics: Retrieved original Japanese lyrics and English translation from search results.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a 3D animated musical performance of 'Chiisana Koi no Uta' by Hoshimachi Suisei and Ouro Kronii, preceded by a short, humorous dialogue segment involving Hoshimachi Suisei in a virtual room.

scenes.description: Hoshimachi Suisei in a virtual room, interacting with a steering wheel and answering questions.
Hoshimachi Suisei and Ouro Kronii performing 'Chiisana Koi no Uta'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
広い宇宙の数ある一つ
青い地球の広い世界で
小さな恋の思いは届く
小さな島のあなたのもとへ

あなたと出会い時は流れる
思いを込めた手紙も増える
いつしか二人互いに響く
時に激しく　時に切なく

響くは遠く　遥か彼方へ
優しい歌は世界を変える

ほら　あなたにとって大事な人ほど
すぐそばにいるの
ただあなたにだけ届いてほしい
響け恋の歌　oh, oh, oh
響け恋の歌　oh, oh, oh
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hiroi uchuu no kazu aru hitotsu
Aoi chikyuu no hiroi sekai de
Chiisana koi no omoi wa todoku
Chiisana shima no anata no moto e

Anata to deai toki wa nagareru
Omoi wo kometa tegami mo fueru
Itsushika futari tagai ni hibiku
Toki ni hageshiku toki ni setsunaku

Hibiku wa tooku haruka kanata e
Yasashii uta wa sekai wo kaeru

Hora anata ni totte daiji na hito hodo
Sugu soba ni iru no
Tada anata ni dake todoite hoshii
Hibike koi no uta, oh, oh, oh
Hibike koi no uta, oh, oh, oh

(Translation: In this vast universe of many, on this blue earth, in this wide world, a small love's feelings reach you, on this small island. Meeting you, time flows. Letters filled with feelings increase. Someday, the two of us will resonate with each other, sometimes intensely, sometimes painfully. It resonates far into the distance. A gentle song changes the world. Look, the people most important to you are right by your side. I just want this to reach only you. Let the love song resound.)
